response.justification: Bogdan has extensive full-stack engineering experience, including C/C++ roles at National Instruments and embedded systems work, but lacks recent deep C++ experience in the past 6+ years. His expertise leans heavily toward JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, and modern web frameworks, with limited exposure to industrial automation, cloud platforms (e.g., Azure), or IEC 62443 standards. His strengths in software craftsmanship and architecture are notable, but the gap in core C++/industrial domain knowledge raises concerns for this role.
strengths: Strong background in C/C++ (National Instruments) and low-latency systems (Dlang at Dunnhumby)
Proven track record in architecture, testing, and mentorship (Stripe, Shopify, Altom Consulting)
Demonstrated ability to deliver scalable, high-performance solutions across diverse domains
concerns: Limited recent C++ experience (last significant role was 6+ years ago) and no visible cloud/IEC 62443 exposure
No documented experience with industrial automation protocols (Modbus, OPC UA) or message brokers
Primary expertise in JavaScript/TypeScript may not align with the core C++/security-focused requirements
